title: Request Evangelion Iron Maiden Special Edition PC
display_title: Request Evangelion Iron Maiden Special Edition PC
wikitext:
[]: [Request] Evangelion Iron Maiden Special Edition PC             Quote Post by juaxoo » Thu Mar 17, 2011 7:44 am Hello everyone sorry to make my first topic/post here a request. But can anyone please tell me how to get the game? I want the original Japanese release, the only place I saw was on Amazon Japan and I doubt they'll ship it all the way to Canada. I want the PC version, its the special edition one where the menu has barefoot in the park BGM and a lot of graphic improvements... This one: http://www.generation-x.co.jp/soft/koutetu/ Please can anyone give me a idea where I can start, or know where I can acquire it online (like digital download, torrent etc) sorry to ask of this I know it's illegal or wrong but a PM to a torrent will be greatly appreciated also. I'm sure not only I have played this before. Some years ago there was a .mdf torrent of the original Japanese release DVD around the web but now it's gone, and of course the download never finished and I was left dissapointed and watching utube videos of it only..,, can anyone please please please tell me how I can get one I don't care of the price I have to pay Thank you forum evageeks in advance

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Mar 17, 2011 9:48 am The Special Edition version of GoS (which was first on the PS2) was ported to PSP in 2009. If you really want the game, check out http://www.play-asia.com/ , they have nearly everything there. PSP port: http://www.play-asia.com/paOS-13-71-9f-49-en-70-376l.html Just be warned that the Sony ports of the PC games (GoS, GoS2) have some censoring of the nudity in the games for whatever reason (not that there's anything too explicit anyway). No Asuka's butt in GoS or Asuka boobs in GoS2 (during the potential "Asuka and Shinji in bed together" path) for us.

[]:             Quote Post by juaxoo » Thu Mar 17, 2011 9:50 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: The Special Edition version of GoS (which was first on the PS2) was ported to PSP last year or so (maybe the year before). If you really want the game, check out http://www.play-asia.com/ , they have nearly everything there.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Mar 17, 2011 9:55 am Check that site, it should be there somewhere. Alternately, there's this site: http://www.paletweb.com/ which should carry it if Play-Asia doesn't have it. (You can always request Play Asia to notify you when the Windows version is available too.) Or, consult Ebay perhaps. Or a Proxy. If you want to download the game, then that's your prerogative because piracy isn't allowed on the forums.

[]:             Quote Post by juaxoo » Thu Mar 17, 2011 10:02 am I can find it except I can't find the PC version, and yeah I think of pirating as a last resort sorry about that i just want a place where i cna buy it digitally and download it kinda like steam, it's best if someone can tell me how I can acquire a copy of it from authroized Japanese stores without having to go to Japan? ebay and every other site doesn't seem to have the PC version, only the PS2 and PSP, thank you for your help Sailor Star Dust though i really appreciate your helpful links and advices edit: sorry i just saw ur comment about the censorship, the only problem is that i dont have a psp or a ps2 and i noticed the PC versions all have the best quality, i just want to be able to play it again, and in the GOS special edition for pc theres a high res photo of mana's chest during one of the endings and her staying at Shinji's... :( too bad i cant experience it myself
